titleStmt.title: SII 17.589: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 589. (A.R. No. 544 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
This epigraph commences with the praśasti, pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga etc., of the king.

It seems to record a list of the lands belonging to god Ulagīśvaramuḍaiyār of Tiruvārūr, in Tiruvārūr-kkūṟṟam in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu. The dēvadāṉam Paḻaṉakkuḍi is mentioned. The details of the gift are lost as the inscription is damaged and incomplete.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ vaḷara malar makaḷ puṇara Urimai yiṟciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi miṉavar nilai keṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉai maṉnavar Iḻiyaluṟ ṟuḻitarat tikkaṉaittuntan cakkarannaṭātti virasiṅhāsaṉattu puvanamuḻutuṭaiyā ḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya korā naca coḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 4 Āvatu
keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārurk kūṟṟattut tiruvārur Ulakiśvaramuṭaiyār tevatāṉam In nāṭṭup paḻaṉakkuṭi �3pakinta�ma� Itu cuppiramaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ mātavaṉiravi yāṉa mānālaiya muventa veḷān kolottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭu v(e) śrīrājentracoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattuk kuravacari cirāma paṭṭarum Uḷḷaḷavaḷantu ci raṅkaṭa
� 2 veli m Āka �ma�
Digital edition of SII 17.589 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
